creator: anmaster@tele2.se
text:
It is currently assign to bind ipv6 ips to jails. As I only want to allow some (4-5 ips / jail) ipv6 ips to the jail and not all I can't use security.jail.socket_unixiproute_only for it.

I hope this is the right place to report a feature request for adding that support.

How-To-Repeat: Setup a jail. Try to find where to assign IPv6 ips to it.
